channel.title: Markheath.net on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Markheath.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: NAudio Modernization with Claude Code
item.description: Almost 25 years ago, I created NAudio, an open-source audio library for .NET. Over the years I've had periods where I've done a lot of work on it, and periods where I barely touched it. That's certainly been the case recently, partly because I've been busy with other projects, and partly because creating a version 3 of NAudio requires extensive modernization and refactoring, which under normal circumstances would be impossible for me to find time for.
